$comment: Canonical inventory of the shell's skills. This file is the ONE source of truth: the sync/bootstrap distribution rule and the preflight health check both read it, so neither can hold a private list that silently drifts from the other (or from disk). tests/unit/skills-manifest-coverage.test.mjs asserts manifest === filesystem in both directions, so adding or removing a skill directory without updating this file is a red test, not a silent divergence. Mirrors .routekit/hooks-manifest.json.
